records.ety: [L. legis lator, prop., a proposer of a law; lex, legis, law + lator a proposer, bearer, fr. latus, used as p. p. of ferre to bear: cf. F. lgislateur. See Legal, and Tolerate.]

defs: A lawgiver; one who makes laws for a state or community; a member of a legislative body.
quotes: The legislators in ancient and heroical times.
Many of the legislators themselves had taken an oath of abjuration of his Majesty's person and family.
